# st-alicloud_flink_member_attachment (Resource)

Manages the attachment of a member to an Alicloud Flink (Ververica) namespace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "st-alicloud_flink_member_attachment" "member" {
  workspace_id = "ae07536b98154d"
  namespace    = "test-default"
  member_id    = "21xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
  role         = "editor"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `member_id` (String) The RAM User ID to add as a member.
- `namespace` (String) The namespace of the Ververica workspace.
- `role` (String) The role of the member.
- `workspace_id` (String) The ID of the Flink Workspace.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Flink member can be imported using the resource_id, namespace, and member_id, e.g.

```terraform
terraform import 'st-alicloud_flink_member_attachment.member["<user_name>"]' '<resource_id>:<namespace>:<member_id>'
```
